method: Landmark points checked against named OSM features and nearest Berlin LoD2 building geometry in EPSG:25833.

relative_relationships.note: Hugo-Preuß-Brücke lies southeast of Hauptbahnhof at Humboldthafen.
Kanzleramt lies west/south of Hauptbahnhof on the Spreebogen axis.
Reichstag sits south/east of Hauptbahnhof, beyond the Spreebogen.
MELH is on the east/right side of the government-band sequence.
Reichstag lies southeast of the Kanzleramt.
The Sinti and Roma memorial lies southwest of the Reichstag.
relative_relationships.to: Denkmal für die im Nationalsozialismus ermordeten Sinti und Roma Europas

relative_relationships.note: Brandenburger Tor lies southeast of the Reichstag.
Pariser Platz is just east/northeast of the Brandenburger Tor point.
US Embassy lies just southeast/south of Brandenburger Tor.
relative_relationships.to: Botschaft der Vereinigten Staaten von Amerika

relative_relationships.note: Holocaust memorial lies southeast of Brandenburger Tor.
relative_relationships.to: Denkmal für die ermordeten Juden Europas

relative_relationships.note: The memorial to persecuted homosexuals lies southwest of the gate.
relative_relationships.to: Denkmal für die im Nationalsozialismus verfolgten Homosexuellen

relative_relationships.note: Soviet War Memorial lies west/northwest of Brandenburger Tor.

relative_relationships.from: Haus der Kulturen der Welt (Schwangere Auster)
relative_relationships.note: Reichstag lies east/south of HKW across the Tiergarten edge.
The Beethoven-Haydn-Mozart memorial sits west/northwest in Tiergarten.
Goethe-Denkmal sits east/northeast of the Tiergarten reference point.
The southern tunnel/Potsdamer Platz marker lies southeast of Kemperplatz.
